title: Better Screens
body: # Better Screens Better screens is a simple mod that improves the screens & containers experience, with simple quality of life fixes! ## Features **Prevent Closing Screens**: Prevents the server from forcefully closing your screens. For example, your chat screen when a Hypixel SkyWars game starts. Originally created by Moulberry for [MoulberrysTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/moulberrystweaks). **Don't Reset Cursor**: Keeps your cursor in the same spot when opening a new screen immediately after the last. For example, backpack slots in Hypixel SkyBlock. Originally created by nea89o for [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament). **Click Out of Containers**: Allows clicking outside the bounds of a container to close it. **Container Background Opacity**: Sets the transparency of container backgrounds. **Container Texture Opacity**: Sets the transparency of container textures. **Container Label Color**: Set the color of the container name text. Useful for some resourcepacks that provide poor contrast. **Player Inventory Label Color**: Set the color of the player inventory text when inside a container. Useful for some resourcepacks that provide poor contrast. **Container GUI Scale**: Allows setting a different GUI scale for containers, such as your inventory or chests. This feature has several issues and is not finished! Some screens may be slightly broken, and other mods may have issues pop up! **Remove Recipe Book Shift**: Prevents the recipe book from shifting the inventory when opening/closing. This makes no attempt to fit the recipe book in your screen if your GUI scale is too large. ## Licenses MoulberrysTweaks is under the [MIT](https://github.com/Moulberry/MoulberrysTweaks/blob/master/LICENSE) license. Firmament is under the [GPL-3.0-or-later](https://github.com/nea89o/Firmament/blob/master/LICENSES/GPL-3.0-or-later.txt) license.
